hero.title: A Culinary Bridge from East to West
hero.description: For over 30 years, we have served traditional flavors with craftsmanship, quality and a warm family atmosphere.

story.title: Since 1995...
story.description: With decades of experience and an unwavering passion for authentic flavors, we continue to welcome our guests with the same quality, traditional recipes and warm family atmosphere.
story.platformsTitle: You can also find us on online food delivery platforms

1995.title: Şişli
1995.description: Our journey began in Kurtuluş, Şişli.

2003.title: Avcılar
2003.description: We expanded our flavor network with our Avcılar branch.

2013.title: Esenyurt
2013.description: We moved to our current flagship restaurant in Esenyurt, Istanbul.

today.title: Years
today.description: More than 30 years of experience and timeless flavor.

flavors.title: Signature tastes of the table
flavors.description: From expertly prepared kebabs to stone-oven pides, grilled specialties and desserts, we bring the Erzenler tradition to your table.

kebabs.title: Kebabs
kebabs.description: Traditional kebab flavors where fire, meat and craftsmanship come together.

pides.title: Pides
pides.description: Stone-oven pides with rich toppings, crisp edges and authentic flavor.

grills.title: Grills
grills.description: Satisfying grilled specialties prepared with carefully selected meats.

desserts.title: Desserts
desserts.description: Classic and special desserts that complete the meal beautifully.

gallery.title: Moments from our table and kitchen
gallery.description: Discover the warm atmosphere of Erzenler Et Sofrası, our carefully prepared dishes and the details that belong to a true family table.

orderCta.title: QR menu at the table, online order at home
orderCta.description: Reach Erzenler flavors easily whenever and wherever you want.

orderPlatforms.title: Our flavors delivered to your door
orderPlatforms.description: Enjoy Erzenler at our restaurant or order your favorite dishes through online food delivery platforms.

uberEats.name: Uber Eats
uberEats.description: Order Erzenler flavors through Uber Eats.

getir.name: Getir Food
getir.description: Order your favorite kebabs and pides through Getir Food.

migros.name: Migros Food
migros.description: Discover Erzenler’s popular flavors through Migros Food.

reviews.title: Our guests tell the story of our flavor
reviews.description: For years, we have worked to preserve the same quality, warmth and authentic taste. Our most valuable reference is the satisfaction of our guests.

first.name: Ahmet K.
first.comment: The kebabs are delicious, the service is fast and the atmosphere is very suitable for families.

second.name: Merve A.
second.comment: Their pides and grilled dishes are truly successful. A reliable choice in Esenyurt.

third.name: Serkan T.
third.comment: One of the rare restaurants that has kept the same quality for years. Especially the meat dishes are excellent.

contact.title: Contact & Location
contact.address: İncirtepe Mah. Doğan Araslı Cad. No: 28, Esenyurt / Istanbul
contact.paymentOptions: Cash, Credit / Debit Card, Sodexo, Multinet, Edenred, Setcard, Pluxee

footer.description: The finest flavors of traditional Turkish cuisine since 1995.
